name: Isikali se-AVPU
description: Ukuhlolwa kokuqaphela okushesha kwamaleveli angu-4. Ishesha kune-GCS ekuhlolweni kokuqala.
instructions: Hlola izinga eliphezulu lokuphendula isiguli esilibonisayo.

scoring.label: Isexwayiso
scoring.description: Isiguli siphapheme, siyazi, futhi siphendula ngokujwayelekile

scoring.label: Ubuhlungu
scoring.description: Isiguli sisabela kuphela ekushukunyisweni okubuhlungu (ukuhlikihlwa komgogodla, ukucindezela kombhede wezinzipho)

scoring.label: Ayiphenduli
scoring.description: Akukho mpendulo kunoma yisiphi isisusa -- ukungenelela okusheshayo kwendlela yomoya edingekayo

interpretation.triage: Okubalulekile -- indlela yomoya esengozini, i-GCS ngokuvamile <= 8
